review_title: Feature-packed - Easy to use and setup
description: We ensure proper operation of new releases for our customers. Better quality, happier customers!
author: Maarten P.
pros: It took less than half a day to get acquainted and up to speed with Endtest. We quickly had the first test cases set up. The ability to schedule test runs and invoke the tests through a URL are really helpful.
cons: Endtest offers support for the most popular and recent browser versions. Would be great if older versions and less popular browsers can be tested in the same way.

review_title: Excellent product
description: It was great experience. Maybe you guys can improve the mobile automation a little better. There are a lot errors there. I have already mentioned it to Matt, who is doing an excellent job.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: There are a lot of things. I can't just name a few
cons: Codeless automated testing. It has never helped me automate any stuff.

review_title: Decent Option for Cross-Browser/Device Testing
description: One division of our company does use this for testing of our public-facing website. My team and I mostly work on internal tools for the company's finance team. I was unable to see a compelling reason to use this over GhostInspector or Mabl, both of which seem better suited for functional testing. The wide variety of device/browser compatibility is impressive, but not strictly necessary for our particular business needs. I think if EndTest had action recording, that would be a different story.
author: Glen C.
pros: Navigation is intuitive and the page loads quickly to ensure a good work pace. Broad support for different browsers and devices. If statement support and database connection/querying is also nice.
cons: Lack of in-browser action recording features, no option to export/import to/from Selenium or other popular frameworks. No option for global or suite-level variables, and test-level variables are not displayed in an easy to view UI.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A beginner testers view
description: I did manual testing before trying Endtest. Even with my relatively limited technical knowledge, I was still able to learn how to set up tests properly.
author: Inguna G.
pros: Video recordings of test execution were very helpful in determining if I need to tweak my test steps. Also, the gratifying moment when the test was run successfully.
cons: Editing test steps could be easier, such as changing the sequence of steps without having to completely delete and write a new step. I would also have liked to reuse some parts of tests, sort of like a library of snippets that you can build.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Automating work and tests with unparalleled ease
description: So far we have automated some easy jobs which were previously manually processed. We're also busy setting up scheduled regression tests.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ease of use of Endtest is great. I came from automating manually with Python, which was a lot slower. Now I can press record, do the test, and it's as good as done. Just add some logic with the easy-to-navigate Action menu to finish up.
cons: One of the few things that I miss, compared with 'manual' programming, is being able to copy individual lines of code/actions. There is an option to copy/move an entire test case however.

review_title: First Time Tester - Super Easy to Use
description: Simplifyy is a technology start up company. Writing lots of code means that things can go wrong easily. Endtest is making so that we don't have to manually test our software all the time, and we can get on to doing the work of developing software and serving our customers.
author: Collin C.
pros: Endtest is simple to use. Before I started testing, I had no experience in testing or software development. I was able to learn how to test within a few weeks. Endtest has made it super easy for me. The Google Chrome extension made my first couple weeks of testing so easy, and I will continue to use it. Their customer service team did a wonderful job of teaching me how to use their software. Lastly, their website is super easy to navigate. I can jump back and forth between windows with no problem. I also appreciate the layout of looking at the results of a test. The way that you can see the log, the video, and the screenshots without ever opening a new screen is easy. Also, I like how you can click on parts of the test that you experienced issues with and be redirected to your test is convenient.
cons: The difficulties that came with using Endtest came as a result of my lack of knowledge, not anything they have done wrong. I honestly have no critiques of their services at this time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Keyword based automation tests
description: I've been using it for almost 2 months. You'll learn quick and you'll have a automation test suite in a few days. Support is great, they answer and solve problems very quick. You can export your test cases to python or executable files.
author: Nicolas Gabriel R.
pros: Very easy to use, you can create execute schedule and backup you test suites. Support is very good and new features are release from time to time Is not expensive, and totally worth it. Web based, no need to install any app or soft.
cons: Some minor issues in the platform, but they are working on it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Codeless Software Testing
description: Customer service is quick to respond and helpful.
author: Erica H.
pros: That I didn't have to know code to make a software test
cons: The import test feature will lose the saved and imported options and you have to go and reset all the imported test cases.

review_title: A great product for automating user testing
description: We have loved using EndTest and the company is super responsive to help resolve any issues we had.
author: Jake L.
pros: It's a simple to use product and is easy for non-developers to get started. My QA team has easily built automated tests.
cons: A little limited on the team level controls.

review_title: Easy To Use
description: Support is fast, helpful, and experienced. The platform is easy to use and predictable.
author: Emylee S.
pros: Very easy to use, much easier than writing the tests yourself. We actually trained someone with no programming experience how to create functional tests which saved our developers a lot of time. The service works predictably every time.
cons: I haven't found any cons yet, the service keeps growing every time I look at it.

review_title: Easy to use, needs time to mature
description: Overall I love Endtest and will continue to work with them and provide my feedback regarding its feature set. Keep up the great work!
author: Andrew S.
pros: I love that I can create and easily maintain a set of tests without any coding knowledge. The team at Endtest is also very quick to respond to queries and is also very helpful when confronted with complicated testing scenarios that cant be easily converted into simple test steps.
cons: Being relatively new application there are a few tweaks that still need to be made to allow for easy maintenance. As an example, moving and creating new test steps and test cases can be cumbersome due to the "move" feature being a bit clunky.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy and Quick setup for automatic testing
description: It's an easy way to setup test automation for testing websites and you don't need to all the coding that goes behind it all
author: Paul M.
pros: In general it's quite easy to understand how it works, making the challenge of test automation simpler a lot
cons: It takes quite some clicking forward/backward to get things done
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple easy way to get into testing
description: We used EndTest to allow (non technical) people from various departments to be able to set up tests on areas of the website that matter to them which can then be set to run on an automated basis.
author: Gurjeet S.
pros: Easy enough for non-developers to set up and run a test. This allows people in various roles to set up tests to automate the testing of features on the website that matter to them.
cons: Can be difficult to debug when setting up tests when compared to running something like headless Chrome locally.

review_title: easy tool for testing with lot of functional complication
description: Good Tool with contunous improvements needed on Performance.
author: Alagu R.
pros: Easy to use User-friendly Easy to learn
cons: Slowness when you run the test - Results page More messages for the user in results page about the current test run ( I always refresh it - don't know why) Scheduling on daily basis will cause issues

review_title: The most convenient tool for test automation today
description: I really like the way Endtest is adding new functionalities all the time. It's definitely one of the best options in the market.
author: Gino C.
pros: The ease of use, the machine learning self-healing algorithm that help to create maintainable tests
cons: The test export functionality doesn't work
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy - Reliable - QA Friendly Tool
description: EndTest is an exceptional tool that revolutionizes the testing process. Its user-friendly interface, comprehensive features, powerful automation capabilities, and robust reporting make it an indispensable asset for any testing team. By leveraging EndTest, you can streamline your testing efforts, improve efficiency, and deliver high-quality software products. I highly recommend EndTest to any organization seeking to elevate their testing practices.
author: Reshma K.
pros: One of the standout features of EndTest is its user-friendly interface. From the moment you start using the tool, you can appreciate its intuitive design, which makes it easy for testers of all skill levels to navigate and utilize its functionalities. Creating and managing test scenarios, defining test cases, and executing tests are seamless and straightforward tasks, saving valuable time and effort.EndTest's automation capabilities are truly impressive. With support for multiple browsers and platforms, it enables cross-browser and cross-platform testing effortlessly. The tool's scripting capabilities using industry-standard languages like JavaScript provide the flexibility to create powerful and customizable test scripts. This automation prowess significantly accelerates the testing process while maintaining accuracy and reliability.Lastly, I must commend EndTest's excellent customer support. The support team is responsive, knowledgeable, and always ready to assist. They have consistently provided prompt and helpful responses to any queries or issues we have encountered, ensuring a smooth testing experience.
cons: It would be helpful for a QA to have customised report generation which gives the overview of the Execution Summary.

review_title: Excellent service and good tool for automation
description: My automation is working very smoothly compared to the selenium. It's very easy to use, the good thing is the document part has so many videos over there. And [sensitive content hidden] has created sometimes good video scripts for testing scenarios.
author: Zahedabanu A.
pros: Easy view to read and write, easy to understand. The service from [sensitive content hidden] was excellent. Always available to help.
cons: I don't think I have anything that I don't like about end test

review_title: Solid software with exceptional Customer Service
description: My overall experience with Endtest has been exceptional, as I stated before, I was an early adopter of the software and I've watched them improve many aspects their software. Customer service it top notch, they have and continue to be very responsive to me and my many questions.
author: Craig C.
pros: What I like most about the software is it's codeless and cloud based, I can build an automated test without having to write code and run the test form any computer. My goal with this software was to build a regression bed, I was able to successfully do this at a very reasonable price and without having to have a dedicated server. Endtest has continued to improve on their software, I was an early adopter and have seen countless changes to improve the ease of use and the functionality. They have been very open to suggestions and have numerous updates to the software based on suggestions I've made. The customer service is the best.
cons: What I like least is not being able to stage the test, much like we do with our software, have a DEV test suite that can "migrate" to a STAGE test suite and then to a Production test suite.

review_title: Gets the job done
description: Overall product capability is more that satisfactory . Some dynamic web pages are not suitable the for the tool.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Good tool for codeless automation testing with the ability to test mobile as well.
cons: Some of our web pages are not suitable the for the tool.

review_title: Amazing Customer Service
description: It's so helpful to have a fast, easy-to-use, reliable program to run our tests on.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ease of use is the best feature of EndTest, but the customer service is absolutely stellar. Any questions I had (even if they were about automated testing in general and not specifically about EndTest) were quickly answered in great detail.
cons: The only part of EndTest that is a bit difficult for us is the long wait times and the inability to predict the length of a test. However, I believe this is a general issue for automated testing.

review_title: Endtest Review
description: I highly recommend Endtest for full blown regression testing of browser side applications. Tests can be scheduled and maintained easily. I have not used the self-learning feature of the suites; however, that is a feature i have not seen in other software.
author: Mickayla B.
pros: The ease of use is easily the most valuable feature for me. I can duplicate entire suites to test multiple environments quickly and with reliability.
cons: The documentation section is highly lacking. Often things are not detailed enough and I need to ask questions, then I will find it was written somewhere not intuitive to that subject. Also the enhancement to test mobile devices needs work to be as flexible as other technologies.

review_title: A great tool for your QA team
description: We've mainly been using EndTest for basic tests to ensure high-value pages and features are working on our site after code deploys. The video recordings of tests have been super helpful in locating where errors may be occurring if a test fails. Besides the features, the customer support is always top notch and personal.
author: Jacob Z.
pros: We've mainly been using EndTest for basic tests to ensure high-value pages and features are working on our site after code deploys. The video recordings of tests have been super helpful in locating where errors may be occurring if a test fails. It's very helpful having access to multiple types of VMs so that our QA team can make sure everything works on all devices and browsers. The test cases in EndTest are easy to set-up and do not require advanced coding knowledge.
cons: Not much I can think of at the moment...

review_title: EndTest is a really professional tool
description: They have the best support team in the world, and in general EndTest is really good software which can easily become crucial part of your continuous delivery process. Easy to learn and easy to handle and it is possible to utilize junior team members for automation.
author: Marko V.
pros: Easy of use, we quickly managed to integrate this software in our continuous delivery process. Also, team members that didn't have enough knowledge about automation, quickly learned how to work in EndTest so we could integrate more resources that our team is possessing.
cons: It is connected to browserstack and it would be awesome that there is possibility to connect to a local device or that EndTes has his own farm of devices. Personally i would rather pay extra money to connect to local devices rather than browserstack license. The biggest problem is that sometimes browserstack has issues and it is not possible to run test correctly.

review_title: Good tool for automation.
author: Ramya R.
pros: It supports for all the browsers. We can copy/move test cases in another test suite. Its easy for use and supports if statement.
cons: While running lots of testcases sometimes tests fails randomly and Execution time is high. No option for copy/move test suites and add new step in between the test steps. Test case results are not stable. No option to move test suites.

review_title: Satisfied
description: We were able to get someone that was not technical to create end to end test for one of in house apps. Provided lots of reassurance
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: You do not need a developer to code selenium scripts
cons: Very tedious work. Maybe a desktop tool or a recording software to make this easier for the non dev
